name: Cuban Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes; 1 lb peeled, drained & chopped
1/2 cup Olives; green, pimento stuffed & sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the wok.
2. Add oil to the heated wok.
3. Add garlic and onion, minced, to the wok. Stir fry for about 2-3 minutes until the onion is soft.
4. Add peas, tomatoes (drained and chopped), rice, ham (if using), chicken cubes, and olives to the wok. Continue stirring and lifting everything together until heated through.
5. Place the mixture in the center of a large platter.
6. Surround with slices of avocado.
7. Serve for 4-6 people.
